calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Carl Salciedo, #2031.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Casey McGuire, individually and dba Chiropractic USA.
Default was entered against defendant on October 16, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 16, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 7, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Casey McGuire, individually and dba Chiropractic USA as follows:

Plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in paragraph two of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Continued To Jan-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Off Calendar
